name: ERROR BARS

meta.form: dot with low-high interval per category
meta.data_required: categories with a central value and a low-high range (spread, CI, min-max)

use_when: estimates that carry a range: durations, forecasts, measurement spread
comparing both level AND uncertainty across categories
not_when: full distribution shape matters (boxplot when built)

data_shape.title: action title stating value and spread
data_shape.source: bottom-left always; states what the range represents
data_shape.categories: array of {label, value, low, high, highlight?}, low <= value <= high

scale.note: x scales to max high; direct labels 'value [low-high]', no axis

rules: the interval is a capped line; the dot is the estimate
what the range means (CI, min-max, spread) is stated in title or source
anti_patterns: error bars without saying what they represent
qa: low <= value <= high on every row
